creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
webalizer ports are out of sync

Fix: 

copy webalizer-2/files/patch-aa webalizer/files/patch-aa
copy webalizer-2/files/patch-ab webalizer/files/patch-ab
copy webalizer-2/files/patch-ac webalizer/files/patch-ac
copy webalizer-2/files/patch-ad webalizer/files/patch-ad

remove webalizer-2

move de-webalizer2/*  to de-webalizer/*

remove de-webalizer2
